task_completion.description: The main title 'SECTION 03 30 00 - CAST-IN-PLACE CONCRETE' is bold, centered, and at least 14pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top of the document. The text 'SECTION 03 30 00 - CAST-IN-PLACE CONCRETE' must be centered horizontally, have a bold font weight, and appear visibly larger than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Major part divisions ('PART 1 - GENERAL', 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS', 'PART 3 - EXECUTION') are formatted with the Heading 1 style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the three major part titles. They should have distinct, prominent formatting (e.g., large, bold) consistent with a 'Heading 1' style. The style dropdown in the toolbar may also display 'Heading 1' when the cursor is on them.

task_completion.description: Decimal-numbered subsections (e.g., 1.1, 1.2, 2.1) are formatted with the Heading 2 style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for subsections starting with decimal numbers (1.1, 1.2, etc.). They must have distinct formatting (e.g., bold, slightly smaller than Heading 1 but larger than body text) consistent with a 'Heading 2' style.

task_completion.description: 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS' and 'PART 3 - EXECUTION' each begin on a new page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the page boundaries. 'PART 2 - PRODUCTS' and 'PART 3 - EXECUTION' must be the very first lines of text on their respective pages, typically with empty space at the bottom of the preceding page indicating a hard page break.

task_completion.description: The document header is set to 'Project: City Library Expansion'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top margin area of the pages (above the main text body). The text 'Project: City Library Expansion' must be visible in the designated header section.

task_completion.description: The document footer is set to 'Section 03 30 00'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin area of the pages (below the main text body). The text 'Section 03 30 00' must be visible in the designated footer section.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a word processor GUI with toolbars, menus, and formatting ribbons, rather than terminal windows running scripts or basic text editors.

integrity.description: The header and footer were created using the word processor's built-in header/footer feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The header and footer text should appear in the distinct top/bottom margin areas of the page layout, often separated by a faint line or margin boundary, rather than just being typed as regular body text at the top or bottom of a page.

integrity.description: The agent modified the original concrete specification text rather than typing a mock document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The body text surrounding the headings should contain authentic structural engineering specifications for cast-in-place concrete, matching the expected raw text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document is an ODT file containing raw, unformatted text for a concrete specification. The VLM should verify that the formatting (bolding, centering, Heading 1/2 styles, page breaks, headers, and footers) has been applied to this specific text using a word processor's formatting tools.
